opendb_id.description: Unique identifier for the document (UUID v4)

min_fan_rpm.description: Min value of the fan's rotational speed in RPM. If constant, fill in min_fan_rpm and ignore max_fan_rpm

max_fan_rpm.description: Max value of the fan's rotational speed in RPM. If constant, fill in min_fan_rpm and ignore max_fan_rpm

min_noise_level.description: The min noise level of the cooler in dB. If constant, fill in min_noise_level and ignore max_noise_level

max_noise_level.description: The max noise level of the cooler in dB. If constant, fill in min_noise_level and ignore max_noise_level

color.description: The color(s) of this product. Each color of the product should be included in the array. Includes heatsink or radiator assembly colors

height.description: The height of the CPU cooler in mm

cpu_sockets.description: An array of CPU socket types supported by the cooler (e.g., AM4, AM5, LGA 1700, LGA 1200)

water_cooled.description: Indicates if the cooler is water-cooled

radiator_size.description: Radiator size in mm (e.g. 360, 280, 240). Populate this for water-cooled models.

fanless.description: Whether the cooler can operate fanless

fan_size.description: Size of the included fan(s) in mm (e.g. 140, 120)

general_product_information.description: General product information and retailer SKUs

series.description: Product series name The manufacturer's marketed product line / family for the cooler. Manufacturer and `water_cooled` (Liquid vs Air) are stored separately and form the default grouping; `radiator_size`, `fan_size`, `manufacturer_color`, and fan count are also separate fields and MUST NOT be in the series. Examples: 'NZXT Kraken Plus 360mm Black' → series='Kraken Plus' (liquid). 'Corsair iCUE H150i Elite Capellix XT' → series='iCUE Elite Capellix XT' (the H150i prefix encodes radiator size, which lives in `radiator_size`). 'Noctua NH-D15' → series='NH-D15' (air). The series stays consistent across radiator-size / color SKUs of the same product line.

variant.description: Specific variant in the series Most coolers should have an empty variant. Radiator size lives in `radiator_size`, fan size in `fan_size`, fan count in `fan_quantity`, color (including Noctua's `chromax.black` / `chromax.black.swap`) in `manufacturer_color`. Only fill `variant` when the manufacturer ships a genuinely distinct sub-model under the same series name that is NOT captured by another field (different cold-plate, regional / OEM-only spin, named accessory kit). Examples: 'NZXT Kraken Plus 240mm Black' / 'NZXT Kraken Plus 360mm Black' → variant='' for both (only `radiator_size` differs). 'Noctua NH-D15 chromax.black' → variant='' with manufacturer_color='chromax.black'. 'be quiet! Dark Rock Pro 5' (single SKU per family) → variant=''. The variant must be unique within a (manufacturer, series, water_cooled, manufacturer_color, radiator_size, fan_size) group; if every cooler collapses to the same value, leave it empty.

manufacturer_color.description: Manufacturer's official color name for this product variant. The manufacturer's marketed colorway / finish name, verbatim. Common values: 'Black', 'White', 'Black / White'. Multi-tone coolers use ' / '. Branded special / collab colorways belong here when the rest of the SKU is identical (e.g., 'Hatsune Miku Edition'). Noctua's signature finishes ('Brown / Beige', 'chromax.black') also go here. Most stock coolers are 'Black'. Do NOT put radiator size, fan size, 'RGB', or family / model words in manufacturer_color — those belong in dedicated fields or the series.

last_manually_spec_verified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the part specs were last manually verified by a human
